reviews.comment:
Horrible tardaron 25 min en atenderme y solo tenia 2 autos delante un desastre no voy nunca mas!!!

(Translated by Google)
It was awful! They took 25 minutes to serve me and there were only two cars ahead of me. A disaster! I'm never going back!

reviews.comment:
Siempre velocidad mínima. Poco estacionamiento y orden para la cola de espera indescifrable. Fuera de eso, todo impecable.
